question: What pets wouldn't cause any discomfort to Joanna?
gold_answer: Hairless cats or pigs,since they don't have fur, which is one of the main causes of Joanna's allergy.

question: Considering their conversations and personal growth, what advice might Evan and Sam give to someone facing a major life transition or challenge?
gold_answer: Evan and Sam would likely advise embracing small, consistent changes​​, finding stress-relieving activities like hiking​​, painting, and road trips​​, and the importance of friendship and support in navigating challenges​​.

I had quite the health scare last weekend - ended up in the ER with a severe stomachache. Turns out, it was gastritis, which was pretty alarming. It was a wake-up call for me to start prioritizing my health, like adopting a more nutritious diet and getting regular exercise. On top of that, my phone's been giving me a hard time, adding to the stress.
[memory_id=5069 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:8 speaker=Evan] Definitely, Sam! Hiking is an awesome way to bond with nature and push ourselves. It's gonna be a cool memory for us both. It's great to see progress, was just at the gym yesterday. Gaining strength!
[memory_id=5121 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_17 dia_id=D17:2 speaker=Evan] Hey Sam, good to hear from you! Life's been a wild ride lately. Last week, I had a health scare and had to go to the hospital. They found something suspicious during a check-up, which freaked me out. Thankfully, it was all a misunderstanding, but it made me realize how important it is to keep an eye on my health. How've you been?
[memory_id=5022 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_11 dia_id=D11:14 speaker=Evan] Thanks, Sam. Yeah, it's really a great way to express myself and my emotions. It's a cool way to communicate without using words. So, do you have any other ways in which you express yourself?
[memory_id=5302 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_25 dia_id=D25:8 speaker=Evan] Glad to hear it! Nature really has a way of calming and reviving the soul. Last summer, I took this pic on a camping trip - it was such an amazing sunset. Moments like these remind us of the beauty of life, even during tough times.
[memory_id=5281 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_24 dia_id=D24:11 speaker=Evan] Good work, Sam! You've got a plan and you're dedicated to staying healthy - have you asked your doctor for advice? They could probably give you even more diet and exercise tips.
[memory_id=5280 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_24 dia_id=D24:10 speaker=Sam] Yeah, Evan, you're right. Mistakes happen, but it's good to learn from them. Snowshoeing sounds like a great way to stay active during the winter. I've been thinking and I made a meal plan and workout schedule. I'm getting motivated by something I saw, so starting today I'm gonna do my best to stay on track.
[memory_id=5303 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_25 dia_id=D25:9 speaker=Sam] Wow, that pic is amazing! It must have been a great experience being out on the lake.
[memory_id=5018 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_11 dia_id=D11:10 speaker=Evan] Thanks, Sam! The sunset painting was inspired by a vacation a few years back. The colors were so stunning. The cactus painting came from a road trip last month. Such cool places!
[memory_id=5279 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_24 dia_id=D24:9 speaker=Evan] Yeah, they were understanding, which was great. But it's a good reminder to be more careful. We all make mistakes, but it's important to learn from them. Speaking of, my partner and I tried snowshoeing this weekend. It was part of a new adventure for us and surprisingly fun.
[memory_id=5192 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_20 dia_id=D20:15 speaker=Evan] 
This is a contemporary figurative painting that I've finished few days ago, emphasizing the emotional state through expressive brushwork and vibrant color choices. It captures a moment of introspection, where the subject is deeply immersed in thought. Very proud of it!
[memory_id=5278 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_24 dia_id=D24:8 speaker=Sam] They were understanding? Phew! We all mess up sometimes, we're human after all.
[memory_id=4986 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:11 speaker=Sam] I haven't gone on a road trip in ages, but I love being surrounded by nature. It's so tranquil and refreshing. I'd love to go hiking more, but it can be a bit challenging sometimes. However, I am working on becoming healthier, so maybe a road trip and a hike will be possible soon.
[memory_id=5122 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_17 dia_id=D17:3 speaker=Sam] Woah, Evan, that must've been scary! Phew, it was just a misunderstanding. A health scare can really make you re-evaluate what's important. As for me, I've been dealing with some discomfort and it's been limiting my movement. I've been trying to make changes diet-wise, but it can be hard.
[memory_id=4812 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:7 speaker=Sam] Wow, that's cool. I love hiking, but it's been ages since I've done it. I did this hike with my dad way back when I was ten. Going hiking together was great fun, and really special for us.
[memory_id=5300 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_25 dia_id=D25:6 speaker=Evan] Nice pic! Does being out in the countryside help you relax and get some fresh air away from the city?
[memory_id=5301 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_25 dia_id=D25:7 speaker=Sam] Yeah, being in nature really helps me relax and get some fresh air away from the city.
[memory_id=5304 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_25 dia_id=D25:10 speaker=Evan] I had a great time kayaking and watching the sunset last summer - it was truly unforgettable. Being out on the water is so peaceful.
[memory_id=5123 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_17 dia_id=D17:4 speaker=Evan] That sucks, Sam. It's tough when our health holds us back. I believe in you – just taking small steps can help. Have you tried any new hobbies recently to take your mind off it?
[memory_id=5120 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_17 dia_id=D17:1 speaker=Sam] Hey Ev! Long time no chat. How's it going? Hope all is well.
[memory_id=4988 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:13 speaker=Sam] Sounds like fun! Which lake do you recommend? I'd love to explore some of the local trails.
[memory_id=5224 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_22 dia_id=D22:8 speaker=Evan] Definitely, nature brings peace and clarity - it's a great experience.
[memory_id=5059 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:14 speaker=Sam] We're traveling through Lake Tahoe! I heard it's great for kayaking.
[memory_id=5277 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_24 dia_id=D24:7 speaker=Evan] I was so embarrassed when I saw what happened the next morning, so I apologized and luckily they were understanding. Yeah, I was out of control--guess I gotta be more careful next time.
[memory_id=5064 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:3 speaker=Sam] Thanks, Evan! Glad you've found that it's been good for you! I totally need to get into it too. Just getting started is hard - any tips for staying motivated? Also, you mentioned another lost tourist? Seems like you're becoming the go-to guy for tourists in need!
[memory_id=5089 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_15 dia_id=D15:12 speaker=Evan] Thanks, Sam. Letting go of unrealistic expectations was liberating, both physically and mentally.
[memory_id=5030 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:2 speaker=Evan] Hey Sam, tough news. Yeah, our health can really put a damper on things. I started lifting weights one year ago and it's been a journey. It was a struggle at first, but I'm seeing some gains. You interested in trying it out?
[memory_id=5193 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_20 dia_id=D20:16 speaker=Sam] That's amazing work, who's the girl standing next to painting?
[memory_id=5194 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_20 dia_id=D20:17 speaker=Evan] That's a close friend of mine who helped me get this painting published in the exhibition!
[memory_id=5238 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_23 dia_id=D23:1 speaker=Evan] Hey Sam, guess what? My partner and I told our extended fam about our marriage yesterday – it was so special! We've been totally overwhelmed by all their love and support.
[memory_id=5225 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_22 dia_id=D22:9 speaker=Sam] Nature can make everything else seem small and help us find peace inside. It reminds us of the bigger picture, you know?
[memory_id=5039 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:11 speaker=Sam] Wow, Evan, that's really inspiring. Gonna keep believing in it!
[memory_id=4979 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:4 speaker=Evan] Thanks, Sam. I appreciate the concern. Life throws us curveballs - that's life, right? By the way, remember that book I was talking about? It just gets better with every page, can't let it out of my hands!
[memory_id=5025 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_11 dia_id=D11:17 speaker=Sam] Thanks for the tip, Evan! Writing in my journal and doing creative writing is a good way for me to express my innermost thoughts and feelings.
[memory_id=5072 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:11 speaker=Sam] Totally! I'm so pumped for this hike. Connecting with nature is exactly what I need. Thanks so much for the support and always being there. Means a lot.
[memory_id=5115 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_16 dia_id=D16:20 speaker=Evan] Oh, I wish I could bring you along. That picture was actually taken last Friday at my favorite spot by the beach. Watching the waves and the sunset colors really helps me find peace, especially during tough times. It's a beautiful reminder of nature's resilience. We should definitely plan to go together someday.
[memory_id=5076 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:15 speaker=Sam] Thanks, I'll get in touch if I need anything. Stay safe. Bye!
[memory_id=4987 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:12 speaker=Evan] That's cool, Sam. Nature can be really peaceful. I'd suggest going for more hikes, like I do. It's always been calming and fun. We should definitely do one together sometime.
[memory_id=5054 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:9 speaker=Evan] No worries, Sam! It's a fun way to get in some exercise and enjoy nature. Let me know when you're ready to give it a try and I can hook you up with a good spot.
[memory_id=5053 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:8 speaker=Sam] Kayaking sounds awesome! Haven't tried it yet, but it looks like a fun way to get in some exercise and enjoy nature. I'm definitely considering giving it a try. Thanks!
[memory_id=5240 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_23 dia_id=D23:3 speaker=Evan] Thanks, Sam! It was an awesome moment, and I feel really lucky to have found someone who gets me. Plus, our families are really happy for us - that's the best part!
[memory_id=5041 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:13 speaker=Sam] Thanks Evan! Your words gave me a boost. I'm staying motivated and believing in myself.
[memory_id=5047 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:2 speaker=Sam] Hey Evan! It's been a rough week - I gave in and bought some unhealthy snacks. I feel kinda guilty. How's it going for you? That painting is awesome! Did you paint it?
[memory_id=5068 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:7 speaker=Sam] Sounds awesome, Evan! Can't wait to go on a hike with you. It's going to be a fun challenge and a great opportunity to appreciate the beauty of nature.
[memory_id=5031 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:3 speaker=Sam] Hey Evan, I'm interested in getting into it. Any advice on how to get started? Thanks!
[memory_id=5191 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_20 dia_id=D20:14 speaker=Sam] She looks so confident! What kind of painting is that in the background?
[memory_id=4985 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:10 speaker=Evan] Thanks! I went up to the Rocky Mountains, it was so refreshing! The views were stunning and I felt so relaxed. Do you enjoy road trips and exploring nature?
[memory_id=5023 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_11 dia_id=D11:15 speaker=Sam] Drawing is cool. I'm still just learning how to draw, but I love expressing myself through writing. It's therapeutic and helps me sort out my feelings. Though, I've been a bit frustrated lately with my new phone. Its navigation app keeps malfunctioning, making getting around a bit of a challenge.
[memory_id=5063 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:2 speaker=Evan] Hey Sam, sorry to hear about that. Gastritis can be tough. Taking care of ourselves is important. BTW, I've been focusing on fitness and it's been really beneficial for my overall well-being. Funny thing, I had another encounter with a lost tourist recently. Seems like helping tourists is becoming a recurring theme in my life!
[memory_id=4968 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:26 speaker=Evan] Yep, last month I drove somewhere fun. The views were amazing!
[memory_id=5014 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_11 dia_id=D11:6 speaker=Evan] I do my favorite watercolor painting to keep me busy. It's a chill way to relax and get into the colors. By the way, something happened two weeks ago! You're not gonna believe this, I had a bit of an adventure recently. Helped a lost tourist find their way, and we ended up taking an unexpected tour around the city. It was a blast!
[memory_id=4983 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:8 speaker=Evan] Yeah, thanks for the push, Sam. Oh, hey, I came across this pic when I was tidying up. I took a road trip last month - the scenery was stunning and nature really chilled me out.
[memory_id=4908 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_6 dia_id=D6:1 speaker=Evan] Hey Sam, long time no talk! Hope you're doing great. I just got back from a rad vacay with my new SO in Canada. Tried some awesome activities too - think hiking, biking... all that cool stuff. We loved exploring the outdoors together, it was so awesome!
[memory_id=5223 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_22 dia_id=D22:7 speaker=Sam] True, it’s important to stay safe. Glad you can still enjoy the peaceful moments after something like that.
[memory_id=4903 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_5 dia_id=D5:21 speaker=Evan] Yeah, every little thing we do for ourselves helps us in the long run.
[memory_id=5020 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_11 dia_id=D11:12 speaker=Evan] Thanks, Sam! I usually paint what's on my mind or something I'm feeling. It can be good memories or places I wanna go to. It's more like expressing myself through art.
[memory_id=4829 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_2 dia_id=D2:2 speaker=Sam] Hey Evan, looks amazing! I've never been to Jasper, but it looks breathtaking. Tell me more about your road trip. Was it relaxing?
[memory_id=5067 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:6 speaker=Evan] Awesome, Sam! Getting started will get easier with time. And don't forget it's about feeling good and reaching goals, too. Let's plan a hike soon!
[memory_id=4810 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:5 speaker=Sam] Wow! Looks amazing. When did you get to go there?
[memory_id=4905 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_5 dia_id=D5:23 speaker=Evan] Yep, Sam! Consistency and perseverance will get us far. Great chat!
[memory_id=5239 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_23 dia_id=D23:2 speaker=Sam] Congrats on the news, Evan! You two look so happy in the pic. These moments make life so wonderful; super stoked for you!
[memory_id=5226 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_22 dia_id=D22:10 speaker=Evan] For sure, and nature has been a great healer. Speaking of which, I’ve got to share some of these new healthy snacks I’ve been trying.
[memory_id=5227 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_22 dia_id=D22:11 speaker=Sam] They look healthy and delicious! Perfect for after a hike or, I guess, post-accident recovery, huh?
[memory_id=5071 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:10 speaker=Evan] Thanks, Sam! That's so nice of you. We'll definitely have a great time on our hike!
[memory_id=5247 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_23 dia_id=D23:10 speaker=Sam] Yeah, definitely, Evan. We both have amazing families that are always there for us. Always a blessing.
[memory_id=4883 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_5 dia_id=D5:1 speaker=Evan] Hey Sam, how's it going? Last week I went on a trip to Canada and something unreal happened - I met this awesome Canadian woman and it was like something out of a movie. She's incredible and being with her makes me feel alive.
[memory_id=4966 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:24 speaker=Evan] Thanks! I love being in places like this - it brings back memories of road tripping in my trusty car.
[memory_id=5055 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:10 speaker=Sam] Thanks for the idea, my mate and I are just around the corner from kayaking on the lake, we're going to try that now!
[memory_id=5060 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:15 speaker=Evan] Hey Sam, it's an awesome pick! You'll love it there - clear water and gorgeous views. Have a blast and take lots of pics!
[memory_id=5190 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_20 dia_id=D20:13 speaker=Evan] Yeah, trying something new and succeeding gives a great feeling of accomplishment. Give it a go, even if it's just a little thing. You'll be amazed!
[memory_id=5124 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_17 dia_id=D17:5 speaker=Sam] Thanks, Evan. I haven't tried much new lately, but I did get this yesterday. It's been my go-to 'feel good' flick. So, you said you had a health scare - how're you now?
[memory_id=4904 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_5 dia_id=D5:22 speaker=Sam] Yep, small steps add up. Stay consistent and don't give up!
[memory_id=5036 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:8 speaker=Evan] You're welcome, Sam! It takes time, so be patient with yourself. Your health matters, and I believe in you. Keep going and stay upbeat. You got this!
[memory_id=5051 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:6 speaker=Sam] Thinking about trying something different outdoors. Any suggestions?
[memory_id=5040 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:12 speaker=Evan] Go get 'em! Believe in your abilities and you'll reach your goals. Stay motivated!
[memory_id=4965 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:23 speaker=Sam] Wow, that pic is great! Do you often spend time in places like this?
[memory_id=4814 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:9 speaker=Sam] We hiked a good distance - quite a feat for me back then. It's definitely a great memory.
[memory_id=5107 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_16 dia_id=D16:12 speaker=Evan] It's been a bit of a rough patch lately. The company downsized, and I was part of that. I'm currently on the hunt for a new job, which hasn't been easy, but I'm keeping my spirits up and staying hopeful.
[memory_id=4963 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:21 speaker=Sam] Wow, Evan! The colors are so bright. How do you capture the tranquil beauty of nature in your paintings?
[memory_id=5241 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_23 dia_id=D23:4 speaker=Sam] Wow, Evan. It's awesome that you've found someone who gets you! Having your family's support must feel great.
[memory_id=5116 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_16 dia_id=D16:21 speaker=Sam] No worries, Evan. And yes, we should make a plan to go. That photo is just mesmerizing!
[memory_id=4984 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:9 speaker=Sam] Wow, looks great! Where did you go? Bet it was nice to get away.
[memory_id=5101 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_16 dia_id=D16:6 speaker=Evan] That's awesome, Sam! Helping others stay committed and motivated is so rewarding. You really inspire us. Keep up the great work!
[memory_id=4981 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:6 speaker=Evan] Yeah, PT for my knee is on the cards. Hopefully I'll get an appointment soon. Till then, just keeping it low-key and swimming to stay active.
[memory_id=5282 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_24 dia_id=D24:12 speaker=Sam] Thanks, Evan! Haven't seen a doctor in a while, but it's probably a good idea to get some advice. I'm going to make an appointment soon.
[memory_id=5042 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:14 speaker=Evan] Awesome! Keep staying motivated and believing in yourself. You've got this!
[memory_id=4992 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:17 speaker=Sam] Cool, a day trip's doable. Nature's calling me, so I'm gonna go check it out! Thanks!
[memory_id=5015 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_11 dia_id=D11:7 speaker=Sam] Hey Evan, that sounds like a fun and unexpected event! It's always interesting how helping someone can turn into a little adventure of its own. And how's your watercolor painting going?
[memory_id=5246 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_23 dia_id=D23:9 speaker=Evan] For sure, Sam. That's what makes family so special. They bring so much love and happiness. It's great having their support and knowing they're always there for us. I feel really fortunate to have their never-ending love and support.
[memory_id=4964 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:22 speaker=Evan] Thanks Sam! I aim to capture the vibe of nature in my paintings, conveying the peacefulness of being outdoors.
[memory_id=5061 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:16 speaker=Sam] Thanks, Evan! I'm looking forward to it!
[memory_id=5057 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:12 speaker=Sam] Yep, Evan! Can't wait. Thanks for the help!
[memory_id=5058 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:13 speaker=Evan] Ready for an adventure? Where will you go?
[memory_id=5077 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:16 speaker=Evan] Later! Stay safe and don't hesitate to holler if you need anything. Can't wait to hit the trail.
[memory_id=5133 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_17 dia_id=D17:14 speaker=Evan] That was wild! I stay in shape by hitting the gym and taking my car out for a spin. Gotta keep it up! How are you doing on your fitness goals, Sam?
[memory_id=5027 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_11 dia_id=D11:19 speaker=Sam] Thanks, Evan! It really helps me make sense of things and express my feelings. It's like having a conversation with myself.
[memory_id=4989 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:14 speaker=Evan] Check out this one! It's gorgeous and there are lots of trails nearby. You'll love it!
[memory_id=4967 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:25 speaker=Sam] Wow, that's cool! Have you been to any fun places in that ride?
[memory_id=5125 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_17 dia_id=D17:6 speaker=Evan] That movie sounds interesting! I'm doing well now. Doctors said everything is fine, but it taught me the value of life. Just trying to enjoy the moment.
[memory_id=5180 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_20 dia_id=D20:3 speaker=Evan] It's not easy for us right now, my son had an accident last Tuesday, he fell off his bike and it was rough. But he's doing better now. How are you dealing with all this?
[memory_id=5126 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_17 dia_id=D17:7 speaker=Sam] That's awesome, Evan! Let's make it a habit to appreciate something each day. It really helps us enjoy life more. What do you think?
[memory_id=5074 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:13 speaker=Sam] Thanks, Evan. I appreciate your support.
[memory_id=5261 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_23 dia_id=D23:24 speaker=Sam] Wow, that looks great! What are your plans for the trip?
[memory_id=5214 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_21 dia_id=D21:20 speaker=Evan] Thanks, Sam! Glad I could motivate you. If you ever want to give it a go, I'm happy to help get you started. Speaking of which, you know what? I lost my keys again, it's become a weekly ritual for me!
[memory_id=5218 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_22 dia_id=D22:2 speaker=Evan] Hey Sam! That’s fantastic—nothing like a good hike to feel alive. We took the Prius for a long drive to the mountains last weekend. It was perfect until we got into a little scrape on the way back.
[memory_id=5070 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:9 speaker=Sam] Super excited to get fit with ya. Let's hit the trails soon!
[memory_id=4902 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_5 dia_id=D5:20 speaker=Sam] Little stuff matters - it builds our resilience over time.
[memory_id=5198 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_21 dia_id=D21:4 speaker=Evan] Yes, that's her, I don't know why we didn't get married before, because I was in love with her at first sight!
[memory_id=5094 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_15 dia_id=D15:17 speaker=Sam] Your support means everything. Here's to moving forward!
[memory_id=5135 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_17 dia_id=D17:16 speaker=Evan] Yeah Sam, it's true. Progress takes time, so keep pushing.
[memory_id=5305 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_25 dia_id=D25:11 speaker=Sam] Wow, that sounds amazing. Being in nature is so calming, right?
[memory_id=5248 sample_id=conv-49 type=raw_turn session=session_23 dia_id=D23:11 speaker=Evan] Yeah, Sam. Our families give us so much joy, support, and love. They're a real blessing! I don't know what I'd do without them.
